item.title: FTC Announces Enforcement Action Against AI Chatbot Company for Privacy Violations
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission today announced a settlement with an artificial intelligence chatbot company over alleged violations of consumer privacy and deceptive data practices.

item.title: FTC Approves Merger in Grocery Sector
item.description: The Commission approved a merger between two regional grocery chains.

item.title: FTC Warns Companies About Biometric Data Collection Practices
item.description: The agency issued new guidance concerning biometric identifiers and facial recognition technology.
